user_feedback: the car still can't move, can you fix that and make sure I can move the car when pressing up or w, I assume maybe the accelaration values are too low
analysis:
- Issue identified: The car's acceleration values are too low to overcome friction, making movement imperceptible or very slow. The accelerationPower is 0.03 which is too small, and the friction of 0.98 (2% decay per frame) is too aggressive, preventing the car from building up noticeable speed quickly.
- Files affected: entities.js
- Changes needed: Increase accelerationPower from 0.03 to 0.1 (over 3x increase) and reduce friction from 0.98 to 0.95 to allow better velocity accumulation. This will make the car respond immediately and noticeably when pressing W or Up arrow keys.
